title: Analysis of Vitamin A and E in Serum Using HPLC with UV and Fluorescence Detection
author: Geraldine Magnin

steps.title: Vitamins are light sensitive
steps.instruction: Vitamins are light sensitive. Keep them protectedfrom the light by using amber containers and working in subdued light.

steps.title: Vitamin Sock Solution A stock solution...
steps.instruction: Vitamin Sock Solution A stock solution of a mixture of a-tocopherol 160 Parts per Million (PPM) and retinol 16 Parts per Million (PPM) in EtOH will be provided to the participating laboratories. Concentrations have been confirmed by UV-spectrophotometry before preparing the mixture

steps.title: Internal standards mixture in EtOH A...
steps.instruction: Internal standards mixture in EtOH A mixture of a-tocopheryl acetate 20 Parts per Million (PPM) and retinyl acetate 0.5 Parts per Million (PPM) in ethanol

steps.title: Retinyl acetate 1,000 ppm in acetonitrile...
steps.instruction: Retinyl acetate 1,000 ppm in acetonitrile Using a 10 mL volumetric flask, weigh 10 mg of retinyl acetate and complete the volume to 10 mL with acetonitrile.

steps.title: Calibration working standard in acetonitrile Mixtures...
steps.instruction: Calibration working standard in acetonitrile Mixtures of a-tocopherol and retinol in acetonitrile are prepared at the following concentrations (ppm) in acetonitrile: %s %s Theworking standard solutions are stored at -20 °C

steps.title: Sample Preparation
steps.instruction: Sample Preparation

steps.title: Weigh out 1 g of serum...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 1 g of serum in a 15 ml polypropylene tube.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of the internal...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of the internal standard spike mix containing a-tocopheryl acetate 20 ppm and retinyl acetate 0.5 ppm in ethanol. Vortex briefly.

steps.title: Add 2 mL of ethanol with 0
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of ethanol with 0.04% BHT to precipitate the proteins.

steps.title: Add 4 mL of cyclohexane with 0
steps.instruction: Add 4 mL of cyclohexane with 0.04% BHT.

steps.title: Vortex for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Vortex for 00:00:30 .

steps.title: Using a pipette, remove 2 mL...
steps.instruction: Using a pipette, remove 2 mL from the top layer (cyclohexane) and transfer in a disposable borosilicate glass tube.

steps.title: Evaporate the cyclohexane vacuum using the...
steps.instruction: Evaporate the cyclohexane vacuum using the vacuum concentrator (Labconco) at 35 °C (minimum temperature settings). It takes about 1 hour to evaporate 20 samples.

steps.title: Reconstitute the residue in 0
steps.instruction: Reconstitute the residue in 0.2 mL of acetonitrile, vortex 20 seconds.

steps.title: Transfer the extract into a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer the extract into a 0.5 mL polypropylene microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 13,000 g and +4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 minutes at 13,000 g and +4 °C.

steps.title: Transfer 50 µL to a HPLC...
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 µL to a HPLC amber vial equipped with a polypropylene insert. Keep the remaining extract at -20 °C.

steps.title: The sample is ready for HPLC analysis
steps.instruction: The sample is ready for HPLC analysis

steps.title: Autosampler refrigerated at +4 °C
steps.instruction: Autosampler refrigerated at +4 °C.

steps.title: Mobile phase
steps.instruction: Mobile phase: Methanol 100% (isocratic mode).

steps.title: Flow rate
steps.instruction: Flow rate: 1.5 ml/minutes.

steps.title: Injection volume
steps.instruction: Injection volume: 20 mL with needle wash with acetonitrile.

steps.title: UV Detection:
steps.instruction: UV Detection:

steps.title: Retinol and retinyl acetate
steps.instruction: Retinol and retinyl acetate : 325 nm.

steps.title: a-tocopherol
steps.instruction: a-tocopherol : 294 nm

steps.title: a-Tocopheryl acetate
steps.instruction: a-Tocopheryl acetate: 285 nm

steps.title: Fluorescence detection:
steps.instruction: Fluorescence detection:

steps.title: Retinol and retinyl acetate
steps.instruction: Retinol and retinyl acetate : excitation wavelength 325 nm and emission wavelength 470 nm.

steps.title: a-tocopherol
steps.instruction: a-tocopherol: Excitation wavelength 295 nm and emission wavelength at 330 nm

steps.title: Open Empower 3 (icon E on the desktop)
steps.instruction: Open Empower 3 (icon E on the desktop).

steps.title: Load the method used to run the samples
steps.instruction: Load the method used to run the samples.

steps.title: Start the system
steps.instruction: Start the system: purge the lines if necessary, start the pump, the autosampler refrigeration and turn on the detectors.

steps.title: Fill out the sample list by indicating:
steps.instruction: Fill out the sample list by indicating:

steps.title: The vial number
steps.instruction: The vial number

steps.title: Description of the sample
steps.instruction: Description of the sample

steps.title: The method’s name
steps.instruction: The method’s name

steps.title: Datafile name
steps.instruction: Datafile name

steps.title: Load the standards, the internal standard...
steps.instruction: Load the standards, the internal standard solution diluted twice to mimic the concentration in the extracted sample and the samples on the autosampler tray.

steps.title: Start the sequence by clicking on the “Start” button
steps.instruction: Start the sequence by clicking on the “Start” button.

steps.title: Load the Empower 3 method to process data
steps.instruction: Load the Empower 3 method to process data.

steps.title: External calibration is used as the...
steps.instruction: External calibration is used as the internal standards are not present in the calibration standards. The calculated sample concentration will not take the recovery into account.

steps.title: The integration parameters have been set-up...
steps.instruction: The integration parameters have been set-up from the standards (UV and fluorescence signals).

steps.title: Enter the sample dilution (sample weight divided by
steps.instruction: Enter the sample dilution (sample weight divided by

steps.title: Linear calibration should be used with...
steps.instruction: Linear calibration should be used with a weighing factor of 1/x 2 .

steps.title: Export the data into an Excel spreadsheet by selecting
steps.instruction: Export the data into an Excel spreadsheet by selecting.

steps.title: Calculate the recovery for each sample...
steps.instruction: Calculate the recovery for each sample based by comparing the peak area of the internal standards in the samples and the peak area of an internal standards mixture.

steps.title: Calculate the vitamins concentrations in each sample
steps.instruction: Calculate the vitamins concentrations in each sample.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 3200 x g, °C, for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 3200 x g, °C, for 00:10:00
